sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, value BFloat16, weight Float32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value, weight) VALUES (1, CAST(0.5 AS BFloat16), 1.0), (2, CAST(1.5 AS BFloat16), 1.5), (3, CAST(2.5 AS BFloat16), 2.0);
SELECT quantileBFloat16Weighted(0.5, value, weight) AS weighted_quantile FROM test_data;
UPDATE test_data SET weight = 2.0 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, quantileBFloat16Weighted(0.75, value, weight) AS weighted_quantile FROM test_data GROUP BY id;
